title: Perform minor repairs to earthmoving and off-the-road tyres
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform minor repairs to earthmoving and off-the-road tyres demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for inspection of the tyre

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret Australian standards for earthmoving and OTR tyres, workplace procedures and safety information 1.2 Identify site and task hazards, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.3 Complete initial workplace documentation for tyre inspection 1.4 Prepare and clean tyre for inspection1.5 Position and secure tyre for inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret Australian standards for earthmoving and OTR tyres, workplace procedures and safety information 1.2 Identify site and task hazards, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.3 Complete initial workplace documentation for tyre inspection 1.4 Prepare and clean tyre for inspection1.5 Position and secure tyre for inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret Australian standards for earthmoving and OTR tyres, workplace procedures and safety information 1.2 Identify site and task hazards, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.3 Complete initial workplace documentation for tyre inspection 1.4 Prepare and clean tyre for inspection1.5 Position and secure tyre for inspection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for inspection of the tyre

elements.title: Inspect the tyre

pcs.text: Identify extent and nature of internal and external tyre damage2.2 Categorise damage in line with Australian standards2.3 Identify repairable and non-repairable damage 2.4 Assess overall repairability and extent of repairs required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify extent and nature of internal and external tyre damage2.2 Categorise damage in line with Australian standards2.3 Identify repairable and non-repairable damage 2.4 Assess overall repairability and extent of repairs required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify extent and nature of internal and external tyre damage2.2 Categorise damage in line with Australian standards2.3 Identify repairable and non-repairable damage 2.4 Assess overall repairability and extent of repairs required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect the tyre

elements.title: Carry out minor repair

pcs.text: Access and interpret information on appropriate manufacturer instructions and Australian standards 3.2 Identify task hazards and risks and apply risk controls to the equipment to be used3.3 Carry out minor repair to tyre according to workplace procedures, manufacturer instructions and Australian standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and interpret information on appropriate manufacturer instructions and Australian standards 3.2 Identify task hazards and risks and apply risk controls to the equipment to be used3.3 Carry out minor repair to tyre according to workplace procedures, manufacturer instructions and Australian standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and interpret information on appropriate manufacturer instructions and Australian standards 3.2 Identify task hazards and risks and apply risk controls to the equipment to be used3.3 Carry out minor repair to tyre according to workplace procedures, manufacturer instructions and Australian standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out minor repair

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Complete workplace documentation relating to tyre repair 4.2 Complete inspection documentation according to Australian standards4.3 Store tyre according to workplace procedures4.4 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle waste materials according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete workplace documentation relating to tyre repair 4.2 Complete inspection documentation according to Australian standards4.3 Store tyre according to workplace procedures4.4 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle waste materials according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete workplace documentation relating to tyre repair 4.2 Complete inspection documentation according to Australian standards4.3 Store tyre according to workplace procedures4.4 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle waste materials according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
